title: Vettel's Shocking Fall From Glory Explained #F1 #Formula1 #Shorts
description:
How Sebastian Vettel went from F1 dominance to his toughest season yet.

We track the rise of Vettel's four-title streak and the 2014 turning point that changed his trajectory. This breakdown covers the pressure of chasing Schumacher's legacy and why the grid shifted against him.

If you love F1 history, subscribe for more driver analysis.

title: Tom Kristensen: The Best Who Never Raced In F1? | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
description:
As a child, Formula 1 was his dream. As a young driver, he was on the same trajectory as Michael Schumacher. Tom Kristensen was offered a chance to join a Formula 1 team, but he saw it as too risky. Instead, he found success in sportscars and made history at the Le Mans 24 Hours with a record nine victories.

Tom tells Tom Clarkson about the ‘risky’ offer he received from a Formula 1 team in the 1990s, the sportscar decision which harmed his F1 chances, and the day he impressed a World Champion

description:
Tom Clarkson is joined by ESPN’s Albert Fabrega and Brazilian journalist Julianne Cerasoli to reflect on Lewis Hamilton’s first Grand Prix victory for Ferrari in Barcelona.

What does this victory tell us about Lewis after such a challenging first year with Ferrari? Why did their three-stop strategy get the better of Mercedes? And are Ferrari now a big threat to them in the title race?

You’ll hear reaction from Hamilton and Ferrari Team Principal Fred Vasseur.

title: 2026 F1 BARCELONA-CATALUNYA GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: This day in Spain will famously be remembered for the first Ferrari victory scored by Sir Lewis Hamilton.  And it was no gift.  After starting from the front row and splitting the two factory Mercedes in the early race phase, Lewis dramatically chose to make a second tyre change - to medium Pirellis -  at the perfect moment. His mid-race pace on the softer tyres quickly elevated him to the front when the Mercs stopped for their second set of hards - and Lewis always seemed likely to be there at

title: A TACTICAL MASTERCLASS! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP RACE Analysis
description:
A TACTICAL MASTERCLASS! 2026 F1 Barcelona Catalunya GP RACE Analysis.

Hamilton delivers a strategic masterclass in Barcelona, using an aggressive 3-stop race to overcome Mercedes' 2-stop approach and take victory. While Mercedes focused on track position, Hamilton consistently exploited the grip advantage of fresher tyres, turning the race into a tyre-life battle rather than a pure pace contest.

title: Alex Albon: On The Cusp of History With Williams | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
description:
In Barcelona, Alex Albon is set to become the driver with the most race starts in Williams history – surpassing Nigel Mansell’s record of 95 Grands Prix.

Speaking to Tom Clarkson, Alex talks about what that milestone means to him and how he’s changed, as a driver and as a person, since joining the team in 2022.

title: 2026 F1 Monaco GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: Although Max Verstappen's qualifying brilliance on Sunday came to nought - came to a dead stop on the grid, just after lights-out - there was still a Monaco GP to be run. There were penalties aplenty; there were Safety Cars; there was a standing re-start; and drivers like Ferrari's Charles Leclerc hit the barriers. title: ANTONELLI SNATCHES POLE! 2026 Monaco F1 QUALIFYING Analysis!
description:
ANTONELLI SNATCHES POLE! 2026 Monaco F1 QUALIFYING Analysis!

KIMI ANTONELLI DOES IT AGAIN.

When it mattered most in Q3, Antonelli found the lap and ripped pole position away from Verstappen by just 0.043s around the streets of Monaco. A circuit where commitment, precision and confidence are everything.

Ferrari looked like favourites after Friday, Verstappen looked threatening throughout qualifying, but when the pressure peaked, it was Antonelli who delivered.

We'll break down:
• Where Antone

description:
Welcome to Learn Along With Maitri! 🎓

In this video, we'll understand the most important Machine Learning evaluation metrics:

📊 Accuracy
🎯 Precision
🔍 Recall
⚖️ F1-Score

After building a Machine Learning model, how do we know if it's performing well?

That's where evaluation metrics come in.

In this beginner-friendly visual guide, you'll learn:

✅ What is a Confusion Matrix?
✅ True Positive, False Positive
✅ True Negative, False Negative
✅ Accuracy Explained
✅ Precision Explained
✅ Recal

title: McLaren's bizarre penalty and Monaco struggle explained
description:
A very unusual rules infraction and penalty was an appropriately strange end to McLaren's tough start to the Monaco Grand Prix weekend.

But it's far from the only team struggling at an event that could provide F1's first big 2026 upset.

04:11 McLaren's pace struggle

title: Monaco's Wild Wings! | F1 TV Tech Talk
description:
In this episode of F1 TV's Tech Talk, Sam Collins discusses all of the weird and wonderful wing innovations teams are bringing to Monte Carlo; from Red Bull's dog-shaped rear-wing, to McLaren's stacked interpretation, see how the teams are trying to unlock performance for round 6!

0:00 – Intro
01:53 – McLaren's stacked surprise
04:28 – Alpine at it again
06:03 – Red Bull's woof wing
08:22 – Audi go for goose-neck
10:04 – What about Williams?
10:37 – Ferrari? Forget it
11:22 – Cadillac questions
